name: CHIMERIX INC.  DL -,001
summary: Chimerix Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering, developing and commercializing novel and potentially life-changing therapies. The company is focused on advancing brincidofovir (BCV), an antiviral nucleotide analog, as a potential medical countermeasure for smallpox. Chimerix Inc. is headquartered in Durham, North Carolina.
